sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince Capital Market Line approach: allocate percentage P = SX/ST to tangent portfolio where geometric optimal portfolio satisfies AHPR - 1 - V = 0. This is optimal f via CML/efficient frontier method rather than direct f calculation. Specific optimal_f value not provided by author.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by calculating the percentage of assets to invest in the tangent portfolio based on the Capital Market Line, where the geometric optimal portfolio is identified by solving AHPR - 1 - V = 0.
